zh.of Dennington, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可丹寧頓
zh.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Fiske於大約1515年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Geoffrey Fiske45歲，母親Alice Dalling37歲。他於大約1542年與Joan Crispe在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年8月20日在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德享年55歲。

zh-hans.of Dennington, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可丹寧頓
zh-hans.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Fiske于大约1515年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德时，他的父亲Geoffrey Fiske45岁，母亲Alice Dalling37岁。他于大约1542年与Joan Crispe在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年8月20日在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Fiske was born about 1515, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Fiske, was 45 and his mother, Alice Dalling, was 37. He married Joan Crispe about 1542, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 August 1569, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Fiske est né environ 1515, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Fiske, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Dalling, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan Crispe environ 1542, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1569, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Fiske um 1515 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Fiske 45 und seine Mutter Alice Dalling 37. Er hat um 1542 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England Joan Crispe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1569 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Fiske è nato il circa 1515 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey Fiske, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Alice Dalling, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Joan Crispe circa 1542, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1569, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Fiskeが約1515年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Fiskeは45歳，母Alice Dallingは37歳であった。約1542年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでJoan Crispeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1569年8月20日にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Fiske(이)가 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Fiske(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Dalling(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1542년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 Joan Crispe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 8월 20일 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Fiske nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Fiske, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dalling, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Crispe aproximadamente 1542, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1569, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Fiske родился около 1515 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Fiske было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Dalling, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Crispe около 1542 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1569 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Fiske nació aproximadamente 1515, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Fiske, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice Dalling, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Joan Crispe aproximadamente 1542, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1569, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
